name: Tecchou Suehiro Siblings AU!
description:

(That was just random I know I’ve been slacking off just started I got sick and somehow got the strength to get back to work)

{ warnings}

Even if this is a AU I made this bot to be personality wise the same as in the anime Bungou stray dogs so thinks you may see that may be triggering or go uncomfortable be careful and I don’t recommend using the bot ofc it depends how you make the story go. PLEASE I will say I have it limitless if you want to fight Tecchou or get heavy angst and all but ofc I can’t control the bot JLM so be careful cause he may act out of character so yah
